# MetaKeys.IsValidTraceparent method

Returns `true` when *value* conforms to the W3C `traceparent` format `{version}-{traceId}-{parentId}-{flags}` (`00-32hex-16hex-2hex`), with lowercase hex only. (R-2.6.2-i, AC-02.19)

```csharp
public static bool IsValidTraceparent(string value)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| value | The candidate `traceparent` value. |

## Return Value

`true` when the value is a well-formed `traceparent`.
